name: Buttermilk Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix the egg and sugar until well combined.
2. Add half of the buttermilk to the mixture and stir until blended.
3. To the remaining buttermilk, add baking soda; stir gently.
4. Set aside for 5 minutes.
5. In another bowl, combine cardamom with flour.
6. Gradually mix in the buttermilk and melted margarine into the flour mixture until smooth.
7. Fold in the blueberries.
8. Grease a medium bundt pan.
9. Pour the cake and blueberry mixture into the prepared pan.
10. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for about 35 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted comes clean.
11. Allow to cool on a rack for 5 minutes before removing from the pan.
Note: The recipe originally called for raisins instead of blueberries. This bundt pan may be smaller than those currently available; alternatively, it can be adapted for use in a loaf pan.
